ConfigGlobalReverse.yakBridgePasswordHelp: The --secret value for the yak bridge command
ConfigGlobalReverse.dnslogAddressHelp: DNSLog system address configured in Yak Bridge: [ip]:[port]

ConfigSystemProxy.proxyHint: Due to OS and Yak kernel limitations, the native MacOS OC/Swift interface cannot be used to set the proxy. Yak engine will open an osascript authorization page to change the system proxy. MacOS users can authorize it.
ConfigSystemProxy.chromeStartPathHint: If Chrome cannot start, please configure the Chrome start path

ConfigPcapPermission.unavailable: Unable to get PCAP support information
ConfigPcapPermission.fetchStatusFailed: Failed to get Pcap permission status: {{error}}
ConfigPcapPermission.fetchPlatformFailed: Failed to get operating system for {{name}}: {{error}}
ConfigPcapPermission.promoteFailed: Failed to elevate Pcap user permissions: {{error}}
ConfigPcapPermission.tooltip: Principle: on MacOS, set permissions for /dev/bpf* groups; refer to Wireshark ChmodBPF configuration. On Linux, you can use setcap to set pcap permissions. On Windows, it is recommended to start with elevated administrator privileges via UAC.
ConfigPcapPermission.windowsHint: Windows can use administrator privileges to start {{name}} to gain Pcap access
ConfigPcapPermission.unixHint: Linux and MacOS can grant full network interface permissions to the user via permission and group settings
ConfigPcapPermission.privilegedHint: You can use features such as SYN scan normally without fixing anything
ConfigPcapPermission.notPrivilegedHint: The current engine does not have network interface access permissions

ConfigEngineProxy.hint: This configuration will automatically apply to most Yak plugins. If a proxy is configured in the scan module, that proxy will generally override this one.
ConfigEngineProxy.proxyHelp: For example, http://127.0.0.1:7890 or socks://127.0.0.1:7890 are both valid

ConfigSystemMcp.startAddressHelp: yak starts mcp via SSE; enter the start address where mcp is needed

servicesFetch.requestTimeout: Request timed out, please try again
servicesFetch.loginExpired: 401, login expired/not logged in, please log in again

InvalidCacheAndUserData.title: Reset user data and cache
InvalidCacheAndUserData.resetHint: If your {{name}} is behaving abnormally, you can use this feature to delete all local cache and user data, then reconnect and restart.
InvalidCacheAndUserData.warning: Warning: this action will permanently delete cache data and is difficult to recover. Please proceed with caution.
InvalidCacheAndUserData.syncDeleteDatabase: Also delete all data in the database
InvalidCacheAndUserData.confirmDelete: I understand the risk, delete now

TimeRange.setEndTime: Click here to set the end time

ShowModal.modalLogicCrash: The dialog logic has crashed, please close and try again!

ProxyConfigUtil.engineVersionTooLow: Engine version is too low, please update to {{version}} or above
